channel.title: Remio Host for Windows
channel.description: Official WinSparkle appcast for Remio Host (Windows)

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Remio Host for Windows — first release

Native Windows build of Remio Host. Turns your Windows PC into a streaming target that any Remio client can connect to.

What's new

  • GPU-accelerated H.264/H.265 screen capture (WGC + DXGI)
  • Loopback audio capture (WASAPI) mixed into the stream
  • Multi-monitor support with live display switching
  • Full keyboard, mouse, scroll, drag, and gamepad passthrough
  • Bidirectional clipboard sync and drag-and-drop file transfer
  • Runs as a Windows Service — survives log-off
  • Auto-update via WinSparkle (this feed!)
